subject: Chemistry
question: The transition state of a catalyzed reaction is
option1: highly-populated intermediate on the reaction pathway.
option2: higher in energy than that of an uncatalyzed reaction.
option3: lower in energy than that of an uncatalyzed reaction.
option4: lower in energy than the reaction substrate.
remarks: Correct answer is "lower in energy than that of an uncatalyzed reaction."
